markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.250 — Court Order in Operator’s Possession

A person who is issued an occupational driver’s license shall have in the person’s possession a certified copy of the court order granting the license while operating a motor vehicle. The person shall allow a peace officer to examine the order on request.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 386 (H.B.291), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2023.*
